title: GroceryDB
description: Project 1 for DSC 106 SP26 — an interactive visualization exploring the GroceryDB dataset of grocery store products and nutritional data.

title: SoCal Guessr
description: A GeoGuessr-inspired game set in Southern California, built with Python, challenging players to identify SoCal locations from street-level imagery.

title: Portfolio
description: Personal portfolio and project showcase site built for DSC 106, featuring dynamic project templating, GitHub API integration, and dark mode support.
